entries.title: FACEBOOK CRAWL CAMPAIGN POSTGRES SCHEMA IMPLEMENTATION
verified_against: PR-M2B: migrations 0112-0117 apply via store.New boot path (internal/store/migrator.go: run-once; accounts anchor is a non-transactional CONCURRENTLY build)
accounts(id BIGSERIAL, org_id BIGINT) had no (org_id,id) anchor pre-0112; leads(id BIGSERIAL, org_id BIGINT) has none (lead-provenance FK deferred)
real-PostgreSQL constraint tests gated on POSTGRES_PLATFORM_TEST_DSN (internal/store/facebook_crawl_*_test.go)
entries.notes: PR-M2B PostgreSQL platform schema for multi-group fresh-lead crawl: facebook_crawl_campaigns, campaign account pool, campaign sources, append-only facebook_crawl_runs ledger (lifecycle CHECKs + partial-unique active/open/retry/task idempotency), facebook_crawl_lead_index identity. Runtime-inert (no scheduler/API/store consumer/SQLite). accounts(org_id,id) anchor added deterministically; lead-provenance FK deferred until leads gains a separately reviewed (org_id,id) anchor. Constraint tests require CI (POSTGRES_PLATFORM_TEST_DSN) and must run without skip before merge. Implements the schema for multi-group-fresh-lead-crawl-spec (PR-M0).

entries.title: Multi-Group Fresh-Lead Crawl — Technical Contract
verified_against: crawl.js emits posted_at:'' — post timestamps not extracted today (content/crawl.js)
dedup layers exist: crawl.js dedupKey/seen Set + posts.dedup_hash UNIQUE insert-or-ignore (internal/store/crawl/posts.go)
org_crawl_intents cursor/next_run_at exists on platform postgres 0108; no multi-group campaign grouping
entries.notes: PR-M0 docs-only spec for multi-group fresh-lead crawl orchestration: org-scoped campaign/queue over an account pool (1 account = max 1 active crawl, org-scoped partial-unique-index backstop on facebook_crawl_runs), server-defined fresh_cutoff_at/now_utc, canonical TimestampParse DTO (posted_at/confidence/earliest_utc/latest_utc) parser->wire->gate, strict provably-fresh window rule (earliest_utc >= cutoff), frontier streak reset on ambiguous/unknown, 3-layer dedupe incl. additive facebook_crawl_lead_index (leads table untouched), org-scoped composite FKs incl. account-pool membership anchored to accounts(org_id,id) (nullable account columns, no sentinel 0; running requires non-NULL account via CHECK), waiting_for_connector_upgrade as open run status, append-only idempotent retry lineage (retry_of_run_id + single-retry unique index) + (run_id, attempt) write fencing, PR-M1..M6 rollout train. Layers on crawler-account-safety-spec; no evasion, no runtime change. Split 2026-07-13 (spec IA sprint 1): business/experience layers extracted to experiences/fresh-lead-discovery/, rollout + rejected-designs extracted beside this contract, stale inline DDL replaced by a pointer to the shipped postgres-schema.md.

entries.title: ROOT CAUSE REPORT
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24E; moved under comment-automation/evidence/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Completed root-cause investigation report (2026-06-04) for the autocomment redirect failure; conclusion fed the PR8 redirect work. Historical evidence, non-authoritative and not effective. Companion to the archived autocomment-redirect-investigation.

entries.title: Runtime Topology — Technical Contract
verified_against: scripts/check_topology.sh (CI grep gates enforce its invariants)
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24B; promoted to platform-foundation/features/runtime-topology/technical.md in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21) — the path CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md name as current runtime authority. Living doc describing current runtime composition; its invariants are enforced by scripts/check_topology.sh and the referenced store subpackages all exist. (Doc also cites internal/server/org/superadmin.go which is not at that path; minor, not added.)

entries.title: SaaS Automation Principles (Vision Draft)
verified_against: high-level retrieval/reasoning/memory + no-blind-crawling + planner-first principles; aligns with current direction but vision-level
entries.notes: Relocated in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21; v1 metadata kept — cross-cutting stale/draft plan). Reviewed in PR24H. High-level system-principles spec (Retrieval+Reasoning+Memory, No-Blind-Crawling, Planner-first, cross-domain generalization). Aligns with the current product direction but is vision-level, not an implementation contract -> draft.

entries.title: Workspace UI — SaaS UX Hardening Track
verified_against: self-labelled DESIGN APPROVED (2026-06-12); PRs not yet shipped per project tracking
entries.notes: Moved under workspace-ui/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24H. Design-approved authoritative UX/RBAC/extension-version-gating plan; the PRs (incl. the cookie-leak fix) are not yet shipped. Future-facing approved plan -> draft.

entries.title: Sales Copilot — Voice Automation and Private-Data Enterprise Plan (Draft)
verified_against: forward product vision after Phase 6 Open-Prompt Agent; no specific implementation contract verified
entries.notes: Moved under sales-copilot/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24H. Forward product vision (AI Facebook Sales Employee trained on private business data) following the open-prompt agent. Aspirational direction, not an implementation contract -> draft.

entries.title: Store Architecture — Subpackage Decomposition
entries.notes: Moved under store-architecture/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24B. Canonical store subpackage decomposition; the subpackages it specifies exist in the current tree and RUNTIME_TOPOLOGY references it as authoritative. Migration phases are largely shipped.

entries.title: Structural Refactor Plan (Draft)
verified_against: tracks open boundary decisions (internal/auth vs internal/server/auth, both exist); quick wins shipped
entries.notes: Relocated in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21; v1 metadata kept — cross-cutting stale/draft plan). Reviewed in PR24H. Living plan tracking structural decisions deferred at the 2026-05-07 cleanup; quick wins shipped, several boundary decisions still open. Future-facing guidance -> draft. Complements active store-subpackage-refactor + component-structure-rules.

entries.title: Telegram Copilot — Bot Runtime Technical Contract
verified_against: bounded-context packages exist (store/telegram, telegram/control, server/telegram, telegram/client, telegram/render, server/integrations)
entries.notes: Moved under telegram-copilot/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24F. Bounded-context Telegram runtime is implemented: store -> control -> {integrations, server/telegram}; webhook runtime present; the legacy long-poll bot.go is deleted as the doc states. Active and implementation-backed.

entries.title: Telegram Copilot — Channel Destinations
entries.notes: Moved under telegram-copilot/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24G. Channel-first destinations backend shipped: telegram_destinations (migration 0015), store CRUD, and control.NotifyEvent resolve/filter/deliver path all exist with tests. Active/implementation-backed; builds on active telegram-bot-runtime.

entries.title: Telegram Copilot — Event Wiring
entries.notes: Moved under telegram-copilot/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24F. lead_created + comment/inbox/post outcomes are wired to per-org Telegram channels: leadingest.IngestPost exposes the OnLeadCreated hook, consumed by the worker and server crawl path; outcome finalize emits via control. (Doc cites server/agent/crawl.go; the hook wiring lives in server/agent/crawl_ingest.go — minor path drift.) Active and implementation-backed.

entries.title: Telegram Copilot — Integration Setup (Backend + UI)
entries.notes: Moved under telegram-copilot/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24G. PR-1 BACKEND (telegram_settings/bind_codes/bindings/alert_prefs/audit via migration 0013, tenant-scoped /api/settings/integrations/telegram handlers, default-safe flags) is shipped. The PR-2 Next.js UI is future. Active/implementation-backed for the backend contract.

entries.title: Telegram Copilot — Per-Org Bot Credentials
entries.notes: Moved under telegram-copilot/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24G. Per-org encrypted bot credentials backend shipped: telegram_bot_credentials (migration 0016, doc said 0015 - actual is 0016), AES-GCM encrypt, GetDecryptedBotToken internal-only, per-org resolveBot for connect/delivery. Active/implementation-backed.

entries.title: V2.5 Umbrella Plan — Templates/Telegram/Copilot (Ancestor Draft)
verified_against: core verified-state-centric invariants now codified in active runtime-topology + v2-outbound-refactor-design + append-only-ledger-migration
entries.notes: Relocated in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21; v1 metadata kept — cross-cutting stale/draft plan). Reviewed in PR24G. Broad v2.5 umbrella architecture plan (Outbound Invariant -> Engagement Ledger -> Templates -> Telegram -> Copilot). Its core verified-state-centric / append-only invariants have since been decomposed into and shipped via the now-authoritative active specs (runtime-topology, v2-outbound-refactor-design, append-only-ledger-migration); the Templates/Copilot portions remain forward-looking. Kept draft as ancestor architecture reference, not active, to avoid duplicating the authoritative specs.

entries.title: Outbound Actions — Technical Contract (V2 Outbound Refactor)
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24D; promoted to outbound-actions/technical.md in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). PR1 (action_policies table + policy-driven dedup, transition ledger rows, 7 global functions deleted, tenant isolation) is reflected in internal/store/outbound. PR2 (drop legacy status column + split outbound.go) remains staged -> partial. Staged plan/risks/acceptance extracted verbatim to implementation/refactor-plan.md; this file keeps the normative invariants.

entries.title: Knowledge OS — Technical Contract
verified_against: retrieval-soak-runbook proves a working retrieval substrate
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24D; promoted to knowledge-platform/features/knowledge-os/technical.md in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). KnowledgeOS backend (org-scoped assets -> retrieval -> context assembly) is implemented under internal/workspace_knowledge. Later vector-DB port-swap (pgvector/Qdrant) and some L5-L7 layers are deferred per the doc, but the core foundation is real and backed by the soak harness.
